items.name: Sword
items.descriptionHtml: Melee 1d6 + STR. +1 STR, -1 WIS

items.name: Dagger
items.descriptionHtml: Melee 1d6 + STR/DEX. Ranged 1d4 + DEX. Lost when thrown.

items.name: Warhammer
items.descriptionHtml: Melee 1d8 + STR. -1 DEX, +1 CHA on intimidation checks.

items.name: Plate
items.descriptionHtml: AC 16. -1 DEX, +1 CON, disadvantage on DEX sneak checks.

items.name: Esoteric Lockpick
items.descriptionHtml: +1 DEX, -1 WIS, advantage on lockpicking.

items.name: Supreme Healing Potion
items.descriptionHtml: Fall unconscious for 1 turn. Then, heal 10d4+10 HP.

entries.name: Dancing Light
entries.description: Create one hovering, torch-sized light which follows you. Lasts 1 hour.

entries.name: Druidcraft
entries.description: Predict the weather, make a flower bloom, or instantly light/snuff a campfire.

entries.name: Mage Hand
entries.description: Create a spectral hand that can manipulate objects or carry up to 10 lbs within 30ft.

entries.name: Thaumaturgy
entries.description: Create harmless sensory effects (booming voice, flickering flames, tremors in the floor).

entries.name: Bless
entries.description: Choose up to 3 creatures. For 10 mins, they roll an extra 1d4 on all attacks and Ability checks.

entries.name: Charm Person
entries.description: Target rolls WIS vs. your CHA. Fail: they treat you as friendly for 1 hour.

entries.name: Comprehend Languages
entries.description: Understand all spoken/written languages encountered for 1 hour.

entries.name: Cure Wounds
entries.description: Touch a creature to instantly heal them for 1d8 + your WIS.

entries.name: Detect Alignment
entries.description: Sense the moral alignment of one creature.

entries.name: Divine Hex
entries.description: Target rolls WIS vs CHA. Fail: deal extra 1d4 damage when you hit them. 1 hour.

entries.name: Grease
entries.description: Coat a 10ft square in slick grease, lasting 10 mins. Creatures entering/starting turn must pass DEX DC10 or fall prone.

entries.name: Inflict Wounds
entries.description: Melee spell attack. 1d10 + INT

entries.name: Eldritch Blast
entries.description: Ranged spell attack. 1d8 + INT

entries.name: Protection from E/G/E
entries.description: Touch creature. For 10 mins, otherworldly entities have disadvantage attacking them.

entries.name: Shield of Faith
entries.description: Grant a creature +2 AC for 10 minutes.

entries.name: Speak with Animals
entries.description: Communicate clearly with beasts for 10 minutes.

entries.name: Barkskin
entries.description: Touch a creature. Skin hardens, gaining resistance to physical damage for 10 minutes.

entries.name: Detect Secrets
entries.description: Magically sense the presence of hidden doors, traps, or compartments within 30ft.

entries.name: Enhance Ability
entries.description: Touch a creature. Gain advantage on Ability checks for one chosen stat for 10 minutes.

entries.name: Knock
entries.description: Instantly unlock a mundane or magical lock. Emits a loud ring heard up to 300ft away.

entries.name: Prayer of Healing
entries.description: Takes 10 mins to cast. Up to 6 creatures within 30ft heal 2d8 + your CHA.

entries.name: Speak with Plants
entries.description: Communicate with plants for 10 minutes, commanding them to part or entangle.

entries.name: Aura of Vitality
entries.description: For 1 minute, on the start of your turn, allies within 15ft heal 2d4 + your CON.

entries.name: Revivify
entries.description: Sacrifice a diamond. Touch a creature dead < 1 hour. Return to life with 1 HP + 1 Exhaustion.

entries.name: Speak with Dead
entries.description: Ask a corpse up to 5 questions. It knows only what it knew in life.

entries.name: Turn Undead
entries.description: Undead within 30ft roll CHA vs your WIS. Fail: must spend turns running away for 1 minute.
